properties.name: Barnett Shale
properties.county: Tarrant / Denton / Wise / Johnson and nearby counties
properties.description: North Texas shale gas play that pioneered large-scale horizontal shale gas development and remains a major historical gas province.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Barnett Shale
properties.notes: Representative play centroid near the Fort Worth Basin, not a boundary polygon.

properties.name: Newark East (Barnett Shale) Field
properties.county: Wise / Denton / Tarrant and nearby counties
properties.description: RRC-designated productive field name for the Barnett Shale; included to connect the regional play to an official field designation.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Barnett Shale
properties.notes: Representative point near Bridgeport/Wise County, not an individual well.

properties.name: Eagle Ford Shale Gas Window
properties.county: Webb / La Salle / McMullen / Live Oak and nearby counties
properties.description: South Texas portion of the Eagle Ford where gas and condensate production are central to development.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Eagle Ford Shale
properties.notes: Representative centroid for the dry/wet gas fairway; use polygon overlays for precise play boundaries.

properties.name: Karnes-DeWitt Eagle Ford Wet Gas Trend
properties.description: Highly developed Eagle Ford production corridor with liquids-rich gas and condensate production tied to nearby processing infrastructure.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Eagle Ford Shale
properties.notes: Representative point for a production corridor, not a specific well pad.

properties.name: Haynesville/Bossier Shale - East Texas
properties.county: Panola / Shelby / Harrison / San Augustine and nearby counties
properties.description: Deep East Texas gas shale interval correlated with Louisiana's Haynesville and Bossier development.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Haynesville/Bossier Shale
properties.notes: Representative centroid near the Panola County core.

properties.name: Carthage (Haynesville Shale) Field
properties.description: Major East Texas gas field representing much of Texas Haynesville/Bossier production after RRC field consolidation.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Haynesville/Bossier Shale
properties.notes: Representative field point near Carthage, not an individual well.

properties.name: Waskom / Harrison County Haynesville Area
properties.description: East Texas gas production area near Waskom tied to Haynesville and Bossier development and nearby gas processing.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Haynesville/Bossier Shale
properties.notes: Point aligned with nearby Waskom gas processing coordinates.

properties.name: Cotton Valley Tight Gas Trend
properties.description: Long-running East Texas tight gas and sandstone trend, historically important before and alongside shale gas development.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Major Oil and Gas Formations
properties.notes: Representative East Texas trend centroid.

properties.name: Travis Peak / Hosston Gas Trend
properties.description: Older East Texas gas-producing trend in deeper sandstones beneath or near younger East Texas gas plays.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Major Oil and Gas Formations
properties.notes: Representative point; included for historical/development context.

properties.name: Permian Basin Associated Gas Province
properties.description: Large oil-and-gas producing province where associated natural gas output has become a defining infrastructure issue.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Permian Basin
properties.notes: Representative Permian Basin centroid; not a facility coordinate.

properties.name: Delaware Basin Wolfcamp / Bone Spring Gas Area
properties.description: West Texas Delaware Basin gas-rich production area tied to rapid gas processing expansion near Mentone, Orla, Waha, and Reeves County.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Permian Basin
properties.notes: Representative production area centroid.

properties.name: Midland Basin Spraberry / Wolfcamp Gas Area
properties.description: Associated gas production area on the Midland Basin side of the Permian, supported by processing plants around Midland, Stanton, and Tarzan.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Permian Basin
properties.notes: Representative production area centroid.

properties.name: Waha Market Area / Gas Hub
properties.description: Major West Texas natural gas market and takeaway hub, closely tied to Permian associated gas pricing and pipeline constraints.
properties.sourceName: U.S. Energy Information Administration - Texas State Energy Profile
properties.notes: Point uses Waha Gas Plant coordinates from the TCEQ midstream export to anchor the Waha area.

properties.name: Granite Wash Tight Gas Play
properties.county: Wheeler / Hemphill / Roberts / Carson and nearby Panhandle counties
properties.description: Texas Panhandle tight sand play with both oil and gas production, benefiting from horizontal drilling methods.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Granite Wash
properties.notes: Representative centroid for the Texas portion of the Granite Wash.

properties.name: Panhandle Field / West Panhandle Gas Area
properties.description: Historic Panhandle gas-producing area that helped shape early Texas natural gas development and pipeline markets.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Major Oil and Gas Formations
properties.notes: Representative field-area centroid near Borger/Panhandle infrastructure.

properties.name: Anadarko Basin - Texas Panhandle Gas Area
properties.description: Northern Panhandle gas production area connected geologically and commercially to the larger Anadarko/Hugoton system.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Granite Wash
properties.notes: Representative Texas Panhandle point.

properties.name: Lobo / Wilcox South Texas Gas Trend
properties.description: Deep South Texas gas trend that was historically important for conventional and tight gas production near Laredo and Zapata County.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Major Oil and Gas Formations
properties.notes: Representative point for the trend, not a specific facility.

properties.name: Vicksburg South Texas Gas Trend
properties.description: South Texas Gulf Coast gas trend associated with older conventional gas production and processing corridors.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Major Oil and Gas Formations
properties.notes: Representative South Texas Gulf Coast point.

properties.name: Austin Chalk / Giddings Gas-Condensate Trend
properties.description: Central Texas Austin Chalk oil and gas trend included for historical and structural context in Texas gas development.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Eagle Ford Shale
properties.notes: Representative point near Giddings area.

properties.name: Val Verde Basin / Canyon Sands Gas Area
properties.description: West/Southwest Texas gas province represented by plants such as Ozona and Sonora and by mature tight gas development.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Major Oil and Gas Formations
properties.notes: Representative basin point.

properties.name: Katy Hub / Katy Gas Market Area
properties.description: Major Gulf Coast natural gas market hub connecting Texas intrastate systems, storage, power demand, and Gulf Coast demand centers.
properties.sourceName: U.S. Energy Information Administration - Texas State Energy Profile
properties.notes: Representative locality point near Katy; use more detailed pipeline data for exact interconnects.

properties.name: Agua Dulce Natural Gas Hub
properties.description: South Texas natural gas hub and pipeline interconnect area linking Eagle Ford gas supply to Gulf Coast and Mexico-market corridors.
properties.sourceName: Federal Energy Regulatory Commission - Cameron County LNG Projects
properties.notes: Representative locality point near Agua Dulce.

properties.name: Carthage Natural Gas Hub
properties.description: East Texas gas market hub connected to Haynesville/Bossier, Carthage field production, and downstream pipeline networks.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Haynesville/Bossier Shale
properties.notes: Representative locality point near Carthage.

properties.name: Mont Belvieu NGL / Gas Liquids Hub
properties.description: Major NGL fractionation, storage, and petrochemical hub that connects natural gas processing output to Gulf Coast markets.
properties.sourceName: Enterprise Products - Natural Gas Operations
properties.notes: Representative point for the Mont Belvieu complex area.

properties.name: Bammel Gas Storage Area
properties.description: Large Houston-area underground gas storage area important to Gulf Coast gas balancing and winter/summer deliverability.
properties.sourceName: U.S. Energy Information Administration - Texas State Energy Profile
properties.notes: Approximate storage-field point; not a public entrance coordinate.

properties.name: Moss Bluff Gas Storage
properties.description: Salt-cavern natural gas storage facility in Liberty County, part of Gulf Coast storage and pipeline infrastructure.
properties.sourceName: Enbridge - Natural Gas Storage
properties.notes: Representative point near Moss Bluff salt-dome storage area.

properties.name: Tres Palacios Gas Storage
properties.operator: Enbridge / Tres Palacios Gas Storage LLC
properties.description: Matagorda County salt-cavern storage facility with pipeline header connections serving Gulf Coast gas markets.
properties.sourceName: Enbridge - Natural Gas Storage
properties.notes: Representative point near the Tres Palacios salt-dome storage area.

properties.name: Bethel Dome Gas Storage
properties.description: East Texas underground gas storage area at Bethel Dome, useful for mapping gas storage geography beyond the Gulf Coast.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Major Oil and Gas Formations
properties.notes: Representative point for Bethel Dome storage; verify exact entrance before field use.

properties.name: Freeport LNG Quintana Terminal
properties.description: Liquefied natural gas export terminal on Quintana Island near Freeport, converting pipeline gas into LNG for marine export.
properties.sourceName: Freeport LNG - Contact and Locations / About Overview
properties.notes: Facility point estimated to the terminal complex at/near 1500 Lamar Street, Quintana.

properties.name: Corpus Christi Liquefaction Terminal
properties.description: LNG export terminal on the La Quinta Ship Channel with multiple liquefaction trains and ongoing expansion activity.
properties.sourceName: Cheniere - Corpus Christi Liquefaction
properties.notes: Facility point estimated from public maps of the CCL terminal on La Quinta Channel.

properties.name: Golden Pass LNG Terminal
properties.description: Sabine Pass LNG terminal that moved into LNG production/export milestones in 2026.
properties.sourceName: Golden Pass LNG - Project / Location information
properties.notes: Coordinate matches public LNG terminal references for Golden Pass.

properties.name: Port Arthur LNG
properties.description: Natural gas liquefaction and export terminal under construction along the Sabine-Neches Ship Channel near Port Arthur/Sabine Pass.
properties.sourceName: Port Arthur LNG / Sempra Infrastructure
properties.notes: Approximate project-site point along Sabine-Neches Ship Channel; use FERC site plans for engineering precision.

properties.name: Rio Grande LNG
properties.description: Large LNG export terminal under construction at the Port of Brownsville, supplied by South Texas and broader U.S. gas pipeline systems.
properties.sourceName: NextDecade - Rio Grande LNG
properties.notes: Approximate project-site point on the Brownsville Ship Channel.

properties.name: Texas LNG Brownsville
properties.description: Planned 4 MTPA LNG export facility at the Port of Brownsville.
properties.sourceName: Texas LNG Brownsville
properties.notes: Approximate Brownsville Ship Channel project-site point.

properties.name: Rio Bravo Pipeline - Agua Dulce Supply Area
properties.description: Pipeline project intended to connect the Agua Dulce supply area with Rio Grande LNG at the Port of Brownsville.
properties.sourceName: Federal Energy Regulatory Commission - Cameron County LNG Projects
properties.notes: Representative supply-area point near Agua Dulce, not a full pipeline route.
